entities.name: PIGEONPEA

entities.name: SORGHUM

entities.name: SAFFLOWER
entities.description: Crop used in sequential cropping systems

entities.name: NITROGEN MINERALIZATION
entities.description: The process of net mineralization of soil nitrogen in Vertisols

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: Type of soil characterized by high clay content studied for nitrogen mineralization

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL AREAS
entities.description: Geographic region where the study on Vertisols was conducted

entities.name: FALLOW
entities.description: A cropping system state where the land is left unseeded during the rainy season

entities.name: MINERALIZABLE NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The quantity of nitrogen in the soil that can be mineralized

entities.name: NITROGEN MINERALIZATION RATE CONSTANT
entities.description: The rate constant (k) describing the speed of nitrogen mineralization

entities.name: EXPONENTIAL MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model used to accurately describe mineral N accumulation curves

entities.name: LINEAR MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model used to describe mineral N accumulation curves

entities.name: ACTIVE NITROGEN FRACTION
entities.description: The ratio of mineralizable nitrogen to total nitrogen (No/Ntot %)

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in the soil
